name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Good news...and bad news:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1339%2E150750%2ELBEPxQ)

Friends -
We are facing a bit of a dilemma on our campaign.
We still have more individual donations than anyone else. By a lot.
But the truth is that our average contribution has been steadily in decline. You may recall $27 was our average during the 2016 campaign. So far this month it's about $16.
Here's why this is a hurdle for our campaign: for each $2,800 max-out check one of our opponents receives from a wealthy campaign contributor, we must receive 175 donations to keep up.
There are two ways we can close the gap:
* A higher number of individual donations
* Donations made in slightly larger amounts

So far on this campaign, most people making a contribution for the first time are donating $3.
Today, if you're able, we'd like to ask if you can chip in $10 to help build the organization required to win. Most of our campaign's funding comes as a result of emails like this one, so that's why we're asking you directly:
**[Can you make a $10 contribution to our campaign today? If we're in this together, we will win this primary, defeat Trump, and transform our country.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/12674?refcode=em190513-2-30&t=3&akid=1339%2E150750%2ELBEPxQ)
Bernie is very proud of the way we are funding this campaign. In fact, he is thrilled that our average donation is lower than it was in 2016.
It means that this is truly a grassroots campaign built by a record number of people donating small-dollar contributions. Thank you for chipping in to make that possible.
In solidarity,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190513-2-30&t=4&akid=1339%2E150750%2ELBEPxQ)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=1339%2E150750%2ELBEPxQ). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=1339%2E150750%2ELBEPxQ). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=1339_150750_LBEPxQ&akid=1339%2E150750%2ELBEPxQ).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=8&akid=1339%2E150750%2ELBEPxQ).

name: Jossie, Team Warren
subject: text JOSSIE to 24477
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We're only just getting started. If you're ready to be a part of this, I hope you'll sign on now to receive periodic text messages from me about events in your area, policy announcements, and how you | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f93c/45c30650/854c6351/6696be05/885061249/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
Hi Team,

I'm Jossie, Elizabeth's Massachusetts State Director. I've been on Team Warren for a long time -- and it's easy to explain why:

Back when Elizabeth and I first met, the issue of Puerto Rico brought us together. She was ringing the alarm nationally for my home community, and after the hurricane, she said something that really resonated with me: **" Jossie, stay close; we need to get this done."**

**And now, I 'll say the same to you: _Stay close, we need to get this done._**

[**One of the best ways to stay close to the campaign and keep up-to-date on Elizabeth 's plans and events is by signing up to receive periodic text messages from the campaign -- all you have to do is sign up or text JOSSIE to 24477 right now.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f93c/45c30650/854c6351/6696be04/885061249/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtYWlsLTIwMTkwNTEzLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/texts-from-jossie?source=email-20190513-full")

Elizabeth brings people together. I was raised in a Puerto Rican household that was big on politics, and from the first time I met her I knew I could be myself with her -- you can tell she's as authentic as they come.

And her message has always been the same -- make sure we stick together to get this work done and fight for the things we believe in. Everyday that message is amplified, growing our grassroots movement, and now it's bigger than any of us.

[**And we 're only just getting started. If you're ready to be a part of this, I hope you'll sign on now to receive periodic text messages from me about events in your area, policy announcements, and how you can stick with us to get this work done.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f93c/45c30650/854c6351/6696be04/885061249/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtYWlsLTIwMTkwNTEzLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/texts-from-jossie?source=email-20190513-full")

Elizabeth has been a champion for all of us, for all geographies and all constituencies in Massachusetts and across the country -- which isn't always easy. But that's what makes it easy to be on her side -- and I'm so proud to see this team growing so quickly, our movement expanding every single day.

**She 's substance, not fluff. She has real solutions to real problems. And I want to share more about why I'm in this fight with you. Text JOSSIE to 24477 now to learn more about me, Elizabeth, and how to be a part of this grassroots movement.**

I can't wait to tell you more about my story and why I'm on Team Warren.

Talk soon,

Jossie

Jossie Valentin
Massachusetts State Director
Warren for President

name: Jason Yates
subject: VIDEO: Pastor Allen Jackson - America and Israel
body:
| | Peter, The number of Israelis has increased to more than 9 million people, and 45 percent of the world’s Jewish population now lives in the Holy Land. Those numbers would have seemed unimaginable in 1948 when there were less than a million people in Israel and just 6 percent of Jews lived there. It’s evident God has his hand on the nation of Israel and his people (Genesis 26:4). **Today we celebrate the first anniversary of the opening of the U.S. Embassy in Jerusalem!** It was a historic day when the United States of America followed through and upheld the Jerusalem Embassy Act of 1995. The decision not only strengthened our relationship with our strongest ally in the Middle East, but more importantly, America honored Genesis 12:3, which says of Israel, “I will bless those who bless you, and whoever curses you I will curse.” **I had the honor of sitting down with our good friend, Pastor Allen Jackson, Senior Pastor of World Outreach Church in Tennessee. We talked about the importance of America standing with Israel.** _“The Jewish people have a Biblical right to their historic homeland. God said it at the beginning of Genesis, and he is still watching over that word today. And I believe it will go better with all of us if we understand that and support them in that.”_ – Pastor Allen Jackson [Pastor Jackson’s conversation](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k7t3PW7lxgMv2NdelpThLP0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190514com01&n=1) is packed with wisdom and insight and is a great reminder as we reflect on our nation’s relationship with Israel and our call as Christians to stand with the Jewish people. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k7t3PW7lxgMv2NdelpThLP0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190514com01&n=2) I hope you will be encouraged by Pastor Allen Jackson’s wisdom and the biblical truth he shares with us for America today. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k7t3PW7lxgMv2NdelpThLP0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190514com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190514com01&n=4)

Those numbers would have seemed unimaginable in 1948 when there were less than a million people in Israel and just 6 percent of Jews lived there. It’s evident God has his hand on the nation of Israel and his people (Genesis 26:4). Today we celebrate the first anniversary of the opening of the U.S. Embassy in Jerusalem! It was a historic day when the United States of America followed through and upheld the Jerusalem Embassy Act of 1995. The decision not only strengthened our relationship with our strongest ally in the Middle East, but more importantly, America honored Genesis 12:3, which says of Israel, “I will bless those who bless you, and whoever curses you I will curse.” I had the honor of sitting down with our good friend, Pastor Allen Jackson, Senior Pastor of World Outreach Church in Tennessee. We talked about the importance of America standing with Israel. “The Jewish people have a Biblical right to their historic homeland. God said it at the beginning of Genesis, and he is still watching over that word today. And I believe it will go better with all of us if we understand that and support them in that.” – Pastor Allen Jackson is packed with wisdom and insight and is a great reminder as we reflect on our nation’s relationship with Israel and our call as Christians to stand with the Jewish people. I hope you will be encouraged by Pastor Allen Jackson’s wisdom and the biblical truth he shares with us for America today. United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO * ©2019 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

I’m writing because Kamala needs your help. We’re coming up on the middle
of the month, which is when I’m usually up to my elbows in numbers --
making sure we’re doing everything we can to hit our fundraising goals.

Part of my job is to make sure we’re on track to reach our projections,
and right now, it looks like we are -- but that doesn’t necessarily mean
we’ll stay there.

If our numbers take even the slightest dip, I’m afraid we’ll have to cut
back on our budget. And with everything that's going on in Washington and
out on the campaign trail, I would hate to do that. So, I’m asking you to
help us out:

body:
I need your help to win a Democratic Senate and pass meaningful gun safety laws.
---

---
Since I was shot more than seven years ago, I have tried to live my life without limits -- constantly setting tougher and tougher goals for myself.

Some of those goals only I can achieve.

But the truth is, most of them require the support and help of many others. I think you can probably say the same for most of the accomplishments you are proudest of, or moments of adversity you overcame in your own life.

**So today, I am asking you for help. I need your help to win a Democratic Senate and pass meaningful gun safety laws.**

I'm throwing my support behind Ben Ray Lujan because I know he'll be a fierce advocate for gun safety. This race is critically important: Democrats can't win the Senate without Ben Ray.

So I'm calling for a massive wave of support before Ben Ray's Mid-Quarter Deadline in 72 hours. Will you join me and pitch in $15?

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Fox News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I won't ask millions of Democratic primary voters to tune in to an outlet that profits from racism and hate in order to see our candidates -- especially when Fox will make even more money adding our v | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f951/45c30650/9ab40890/6696a787/415737189/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
Fox News invited me to do a town hall on their network.

**I turned them down.** Let me tell you why.

I love town halls. I've done more than 70 since January, and I'm glad to have a television audience be a part of them.

**But Fox News is a hate-for-profit racket that gives a megaphone to racists and conspiracists** -- it's designed to turn us against each other, risking life and death consequences, to provide cover for the corruption that's rotting our government and hollowing out our middle class.

Hate-for-profit works only if there's profit, so Fox News balances a mix of bigotry, racism, and outright lies with enough legit journalism to make the claim to advertisers that it's a reputable news outlet.

It's all about dragging in ad money -- big ad money.

But Fox News is struggling as more and more advertisers are pulling out of its hate-filled space. A Democratic town hall gives the Fox News sales team a way to tell potential sponsors it's safe to buy ads on Fox -- no harm to their brand or reputation (spoiler: it's not).

There's one place we can fight back: **I won 't ask millions of Democratic primary voters to tune in to an outlet that profits from racism and hate in order to see our candidates -- especially when Fox will make even more money adding our valuable audience to their ratings numbers.

[So instead of helping Fox News turn a fatter profit, I'll keep building the grassroots movement that we need to win in 2020 and make real change starting in 2021. If you're with me, will you pitch in $3 or whatever you can afford to keep up the fight?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f951/45c30650/9ab40890/6696a786/415737189/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTE0ZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190514em1-full")**

I'm running a campaign to reach all Americans. I take questions from the press and voters everywhere I go. I've already held town halls in 17 states and Puerto Rico -- including West Virginia, Ohio, Georgia, Utah, Tennessee, Texas, Colorado, Mississippi, and Alabama.

I've done 57 media availabilities and 131 interviews, taking over 1,100 questions from press just since January. Fox News is welcome to come to my events just like any other outlet. But a Fox News town hall adds money to the hate-for-profit machine. To which I say: hard pass.

Instead, I'll keep talking with people around the country. Meeting them in living rooms, school gyms, theaters, breweries, concert halls, anywhere we can all squeeze in. Taking questions from both voters and journalists. Taking photos with anyone who wants one (we just took our 20,000th selfie after a town hall in Cincinnati).

Face to face, person to person, we'll keep building our grassroots movement.

Without doing any favors for Fox News.

Without getting any help from any Super PAC.

Without hosting any private fundraisers or taking a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind.

**You and me -- we'll keep fighting side by side. We're building this together.

[Own a piece of our campaign by making your first contribution right now:](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f951/45c30650/9ab40890/6696a786/415737189/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTE0ZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190514em1-full")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852f951/45c30650/9ab40890/6696a786/415737189/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTE0ZW0xLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190514em1-full")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Why Free Traders and All Americans Should Back Trump on China Policy
body:
“If ever there were a right time to impose punitive tariffs, it is now, and it is against China,” economic expert Stephen Moore writes in The Hill. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=87f8a6cd20&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Why Free Traders and All Americans Should Back Trump on China Policy**

“If ever there were a right time to impose punitive tariffs, it is now, and it is against China,” economic expert Stephen Moore writes in _The Hill_. “This is the right moment to shut down China’s abusive trade practices forever.”

Here is the essential fact you don’t hear on the nightly news: “The average tariff that we imposed on China when Trump entered the White House was about 4 percent. China’s tariffs on us were about 10 percent,” Moore explains. “There is not one demand that Trump is making of China’s President Xi that is unreasonable.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d2b003647c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “NASA is planning on sending the first woman ever and the first man in nearly five decades to the moon by 2024, thanks to an additional increase to the agency's budget by President Trump,” Amanda Jackson and Chris Boyette report for [CNN](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23a826efaa&e=3ee4985eea). “Under my Administration, we are restoring [NASA] to greatness,” the President tweeted.
---
|
---
| “Next time you hear that the costs of the trade war are simply being borne by Americans, be suspicious. In their zeal to make Trump look completely wrong, on tariffs or other issues, too many commentators pick and choose their arguments,” economist Tyler Cowen writes in _[Bloomberg](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=84ed7c42e3&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Trump’s threats are exerting some very real pressure” on China, Cowen says.
---
|
---
| “Immigration crime, virtually all involving illegal male, Hispanic immigrants, was the top offense in federal courts last year, according to the United States Sentencing Commission,” Paul Bedard reports for the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ebc97c4bf&e=3ee4985eea)_. All told, immigration crimes accounted for more than one-third of all sentencing cases. These crimes include trafficking U.S. passports, smuggling, transporting, and unlawfully entering the United States.
---
|
---
| “There is a clear disconnect between the rhetoric of the Democrats and the gains being felt in the Trump economy because of the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (TCJA). The U.S. jobless rate is at a 50-year low, but according to the left, the current strong economic outlook is purely coincidental,” tax expert Alex Hendrie writes in [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=369beb930b&e=3ee4985eea). “Americans at every income level and in every Congressional district are seeing tax reduction, a fact that even left-of-center think tanks and the New York Times have admitted.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a2ce235e78&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f552cff986&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=46725e30f4)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Joe Biden
subject: Donald Trump's administration opposes the Equality Act. I'm fighting to pass it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
| Peter,

No one should live in fear of being fired, evicted from their home, or denied service in a restaurant just because of who they are or who they love.

**But yesterday, Donald Trump 's administration announced it opposes the Equality Act.**

This is a slap in the face to millions of LGBTQ Americans in this country.

The Equality Act is long overdue, and will ensure LGBTQ Americans are treated with the dignity and respect they deserve.

By coming out against the Equality Act, Donald Trump just told millions of Americans that they don't matter. **Peter, I 'm here to tell you that he's wrong and they do.**

I will always work to protect LGBTQ rights and support the Equality Act. But Peter, I need you with me. [Sign your name to support the Equality Act >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b9b/1cd0ac28/389072f0/356b2900/2512275939/VEsH/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Equality-Act?source=email-bsd-20190514equality-b2_PET_sendwide_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190514equality&utm_content=b2_PET_sendwide_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1") | | [**SIGN MY NAME >>**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b9b/1cd0ac28/389072f0/356b2900/2512275939/VEsE/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Equality-Act?source=email-bsd-20190514equality-b2_PET_sendwide_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190514equality&utm_content=b2_PET_sendwide_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")
---
We can't allow forces of intolerance in our society to have an ally in the White House.

We have made remarkable progress over the past decade towards equality for LGBTQ people in America, but our work is not done. Now is not the time to back down.

Peter, I've always been a fierce supporter of LGBTQ rights, even when most political advisors said that was a bad idea.

And now that these rights are under attack again, I will fight for them harder than ever before. **Will you join me?**

**Sign my petition to support the Equality Act:**

[https://go.joebiden.com/Equality-Act](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b9b/1cd0ac28/389072f0/356b2900/2512275939/VEsF/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Equality-Act?source=email-bsd-20190514equality-b2_PET_sendwide_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190514equality&utm_content=b2_PET_sendwide_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")

Thank you for joining me in this fight,
_Joe_

|

body:
But there's still time to course-correct.
| | |

Hey Peter--tiny bit of bad news today, but I think there's still time to course-correct:
I just took a look at where we're at with our fundraising goals for May. We needed to raise $200,000 this month to keep our campaign on track--to keep Kirsten out on the road meeting voters, hire more staff and keep our digital ads up.
We're pacing a bit behind on our monthly goal, but if we hustle now, I think we can turn things around in time.
You haven't given to Kirsten's campaign for president yet, but I hope you'll make your first donation today. **[You can help us get back on track with our May fundraising goal, and on top of that, become a Debate Stage Donor to help us hit the DNC's 65,000-donor threshold and guarantee Kirsten's on the debate stage. Just $1 helps!](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9772f2/2ae112ef/6f63e6e6/357c4fd3/652709387/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMDMtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3103-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

We are definitely an underdog in this race. A bunch of other candidates have already guaranteed their spots on the debate stage with both their polling and their number of donors.
But no candidate will be nearly as strong a voice for women and families as Kirsten will be. She's got a plan to get dark money out of politics; she's the only candidate with an extensive reproductive rights agenda and she's refused to take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists or fossil fuel executives--and we don't have an individual super PAC.
That makes hitting goals like our May one that much harder, but we're committed to running an honest, transparent campaign. That's the kind of administration Kirsten will build in the White House, too.
**Make your first donation to our campaign today, Peter --just $1 helps guarantee Kirsten's on the debate stage, but anything above that you can give would go such a long way toward helping us hit our May fundraising goal:**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9772f2/2ae112ef/6f63e6e6/357c4fd3/652709387/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMDMtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3103-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for everything--really glad to have you with us in this fight.
Jess

subject: Memo to the far left: The energy revolution is already here
body:
A few hours ago, President Donald J. Trump spoke before a crowd of construction and energy workers in Hackberry, Louisiana. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=872d997c88&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 14, 2019
---
| | |
# **Memo to the far left: The energy revolution is already here **

**A few hours ago,** President Donald J. Trump spoke before a crowd of construction and energy workers in Hackberry, Louisiana. He was in town to tour the Cameron LNG export facility—new energy infrastructure that will support jobs and small businesses in southwest Louisiana for the next 20 years and beyond.

**He made them a promise** : On his watch, America will never stop fighting to protect its spot as the “energy superpower of the world.”
**🎬** **President Trump** : [“A future of American energy independence”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=684b5bea09&e=3ee4985eea)
**Both parties** should agree on that vision. But in 2019, nothing is simple. The far left in Congress has embraced a different mission: the “Green New Deal.” Rather than get behind the American energy revolution that has both cut carbon emissions _and_ delivered high-paying jobs and affordable power in recent years, Congressional Democrats want Congress to pick which industries win and which ones lose.

**In their view** , if a clean energy revolution isn’t run out of Washington, it doesn’t count.

**No matter.** “The golden era of American energy is now underway,” President Trump says—even if the far left refuses to join our citizens for the ride. Here is what the age of U.S. energy dominance looks like under President Trump:
* America has become the largest crude oil producer _on Earth_.

* The United States has become a net natural gas exporter for the first time since 1957.

* Total energy production across various sources reached record highs in 2018.

* Mining and oil and gas extraction has contributed to economic growth in 49 states.

**So the scorecard** : More high-paying jobs for workers. Cheaper energy for American families. Lower taxes on the middle class. And cleaner, modern power with lower emissions for our booming economy.

**Not a bad deal** —even if Congressional Democrats don’t get to claim credit for this one.

[President Trump: The age of American energy dominance is here.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9d34b37816&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **NASA’s mission: Return to the moon by 2024**

**Yesterday,** President Trump shared big news as he set new priorities for America’s future in space. “Under my Administration, we are restoring [NASA] to greatness and we are going back to the Moon, then Mars,” [the President wrote on Twitter](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ff545ff1d&e=3ee4985eea).

**NASA** is set to bring America back to the lunar surface by 2024. This new mission is fittingly named Artemis, after the Greek goddess of the Moon—and Apollo’s twin sister.

**Even more historic** : The next man on the moon will be accompanied by the first woman to ever step foot on its surface. “Everyone who is of age remembers where they were when Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin walked on the Moon. We are trying to create that moment for the next generation,” NASA Administrator Jim Bridenstine says.

“[NASA plans to land the first woman on the moon by 2024.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=37719c26de&e=3ee4985eea)
